data.title: Write RED structural tests for consumer_completeness dimension in scope reviewer
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Create tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh with 2 tests that FAIL RED before consumer_completeness is added to scope.md and epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md:
- test_scope_reviewer_has_consumer_completeness_dimension: grep -qE 'consumer_completeness' scope.md
- test_pipeline_scope_passes_part_c_output: grep -q 'consumer_completeness' epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md

Rule 5 exemption: non-executable LLM instruction files — structural boundary tests only.

## Implementation Steps
1. Create tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh following the same pattern as test-epic-scrutiny-pipeline.sh
2. Add 2 test functions (file existence check + both grep assertions)
3. Add calls in Run all tests section
4. Update .test-index: add line 'plugins/dso/skills/shared/docs/reviewers/scope.md:tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh [test_scope_reviewer_has_consumer_completeness_dimension]'
5. Verify bash tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh exits non-zero (RED)

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh: create (new test file)
- .test-index: modify (add scope.md -> new test mapping with RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] test_scope_reviewer_has_consumer_completeness_dimension function exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_scope_reviewer_has_consumer_completeness_dimension' tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh
- [ ] test_pipeline_scope_passes_part_c_output function exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_pipeline_scope_passes_part_c_output' tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh
- [ ] .test-index has new mapping for scope.md -> test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh \[' .test-index
- [ ] RED confirmation: test file exits non-zero
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
